LIVING WITH

LIVING AV

€ SA MICI,

PREPARING YOUR
HOSPITALIZATION

Before even being admitted to the hospital, it is useful to
know well your rights and duties, the terms of coverage
in particular accommodation costs, the things
not to forget to preserve your well-being …

1/ Preparing your absence from home

Whether you live with family or alone, an absence of a few
days should be prepared, notably with your relatives
and with your employer if applicable. Within the family,
childcare should be arranged to ensure children
maintain their usual routines as much as possible. Your
health or social care professionals can be useful
supports, do not hesitate to raise all these ques-
tions with them.

Our advice.
